Partnership Program

Referral Policy.

Official commission payout framework for Web/WebApp development referrals.


Submit via WhatsApp Submit via Email

Standard Commission Tiers

LAST UPDATED

30 DECEMBER 2025

Swipe right to view full table →
Project Value (NET) Commission % Lead Priority
Up to ₹50,000 5% Standard
₹50,001 — ₹3,00,000 8% Standard
₹3,00,001 — ₹5,00,000 10% Priority
Over ₹5,00,000 12.5% Strategic

Elite Partner Program

Reserved for repeat partners with 5+ successful referrals or active AMC management. This tier represents our commitment to long-term partnership.

Flat Commission 15%
Max Payout ₹ 3,00,000 / referral

Eligibility Protocol

  • Applicable exclusively to Web Development, Webapp, and Native App (Android/iOS) projects.
  • Referrer must provide Lead Name, Contact, and Project Brief before the client initiates direct contact.
  • Commission is paid solely for new client acquisitions.
  • Leads remain valid for 30 calendar days from acknowledgment.
  • Individuals are ineligible to refer their own company.

Disbursement Logic

  • Payouts triggered only after Cyber Alliance receives full project payment.
  • Commissions disbursed within 15 business days via NEFT/IMPS/UPI.
  • Calculated on Net Project Value (excluding taxes, hosting, and domain costs).
  • Standard payouts capped at ₹1,00,000 per referral unless Elite Status is active.
  • TDS Deduction: 5% statutory TDS deducted per Section 194H.

Operational Workflow

01

Initial Intake

Referrer transmits lead identity and core technical requirements to the engineering team via WhatsApp or Email.

02

Lead Attribution

A unique tracking URL is issued, valid for a 30-day conversion window.

03

Project Scoping

Lead executes submission via the official form. Quote including all third-party costs is sent.

04

Secure Onboarding

Client validates terms via a non-refundable retainer (25% or 50% depending on scope).

05

Technical Gating

Development follows strict milestone gating with verified progress payments.

06

Payout Execution

Final commission (minus 5% TDS) is transmitted via NEFT/UPI within 15 days of verified fund receipt.

Commission Calculator & FAQ

Calculation Examples

Elite (Under Cap)

Net Project Value: ₹10,00,000

Rate: 15%

₹1,50,000 (-5% TDS)

Elite (Cap Reached)

Net Project Value: ₹30,00,000

Rate: 15% (₹4.5L)

₹3,00,000 (-5% TDS)

What kind of unique referral link?

Upon successful onboarding as a partner, you are issued a unique tracking slug. Example: tsuro.in/yourname
Any lead that lands via this link is automatically attributed to your account in our CRM.

Legal Compliance & Governance

Taxation & TDS

Under the Income Tax Act of India (Sec 194H), a 5% TDS will be deducted from all commissions. Referrers must provide PAN details for processing. Cyber Alliance maintains absolute transparency; project quotes are never inflated to cover referral fees.

Modification & Jurisdiction

Cyber Alliance reserves the right to amend rates or terminate the program without prior notice. This policy is governed by Indian law, with exclusive jurisdiction held by the Courts of New Delhi.
